description: OpenCapital provides SEC-derived fundamentals and related public-company financial data, including metrics, segments, quarters, and filing-linked figures. Its public integration presence on this domain is an MCP server for AI assistants and agents.
summary: OpenCapital exposes one OAuth-protected remote MCP server at https://api.opencapital.sh/mcp over Streamable HTTP; no separate HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surface was publicly documented on this domain.
